stories.title_zh: 字节探索自动驾驶，Seed世界模型团队负责｜36氪独家
stories.title_en: 字节探索自动驾驶，Seed世界模型团队负责｜36氪独家
stories.desc_zh: 36氪从多位产业人士处获悉，字节跳动正探索进入自动驾驶领域。这一项目目前由Seed旗下周畅的世界模型团队负责。据了解，Seed旗下不仅有周畅的多模态模型、世界模型等团队，还有大语言模型方向。 而自动驾驶与世界模型的技术路线有交叠之处。 另有消息人士告诉36氪，业务方向上，字节有意布局的自动驾驶场景有无人物流，这一业务隶属于字节旗下的火山引擎汽车行业线。 部分接近字节的知情人士表示，字节团队此前与一些头部自动驾驶团队进行过业务探讨交流，目前字节的自动驾驶项目已进入早期筹备状态。字节向不少头部辅助驾驶或自动驾驶人才发出了邀约，一些看好字节这一布局的技术人才也计划加入。 针对以上消息，36氪向字节求证，字节回应：“字节在AI大模型前沿探索领域，包括物理AI领域，有很多早期研究和探索，但并没有做智能驾驶业务的计划。” Seed是字节旗下的大模型基础研究团队，成立于2023年，是字节的一级战略级部门
stories.desc_en: 36 Krypton learned from a number of industry sources that ByteDance is exploring the field of autonomous driving. This project is currently handled by Seed's Seamless World Model team. It is understood that Seed not only has Zhou Chang's multimodal model, world model and other teams, but also has a large language model direction. stories.desc_zh: 融资讨论表明，投资者有兴趣应用人工智能在生命科学方面取得突破。
stories.desc_en: The funding discussions point to investor interest in applying AI to make breakthroughs in life sciences.

stories.title_zh: Lorde说AI眼镜“不性感”
stories.title_en: Lorde says AI glasses are ‘not sexy’
stories.desc_zh: “在我们的世界里，越来越难知道什么是真实的，”洛德在舞台上说。
stories.desc_en: "Increasingly in our world, it gets harder and harder to know what is real," Lorde said onstage.

stories.title_zh: 据报道， OpenAI的第一个硬件设备是一款可以移动的无屏幕扬声器，
stories.title_en: OpenAI’s first hardware device is reportedly a screenless speaker that can move
stories.desc_zh: 该设备被奇怪地描述为涉及“可以自行移动的机械元件” ，彭博社的报告包括该设备旨在“感觉像一个伴侣，并成为OpenAI的ChatGPT的物理表现”的细节。
stories.desc_en: The device is weirdly described as involving "mechanical elements that can move on their own" and the Bloomberg report includes the detail that the device is designed to "feel like a companion and become a physical manifestation of OpenAI’s ChatGPT."

stories.title_zh: OpenAI推翻苹果商业秘密诉讼
stories.title_en: OpenAI pushes back on Apple trade secret lawsuit
stories.desc_zh: OpenAI就该诉讼发布了另一份声明，这次表明它缺乏法律依据。
stories.desc_en: OpenAI has issued another statement on the lawsuit, this time suggesting it lacks merit.

stories.title_zh: OpenAI的新旗舰机型自行删除文件，人们不断警告
stories.title_en: OpenAI’s new flagship model deletes files on its own, people keep warning
stories.desc_zh: 许多社交媒体帖子声称GPT-5.6 SOL在没有警告的情况下删除了文件和数据。OpenAI在6月份基本披露了这个问题。
stories.desc_en: A number of social media posts claim that GPT-5.6 Sol deleted files and data without warning. OpenAI had basically disclosed the problem in June.

stories.title_zh: 苹果通过iOS 27公开测试版向所有人开放其新的Siri AI
stories.title_en: Apple opens its new Siri AI to everyone with the iOS 27 public beta
stories.desc_zh: 如果您一直在等待尝试Apple改进的Siri ，而无需安装开发人员测试版，您现在就可以了。该公司周二发布了iOS 27公开测试版，让iPhone用户在该软件今年秋季正式推出之前，可以提前访问其人工智能助手和其他新功能。
stories.desc_en: If you’ve been waiting to try Apple’s revamped Siri without installing a developer beta, you now can. The company on Tuesday released the iOS 27 public beta, giving iPhone owners early access to its AI-powered assistant and other new features before the software’s official launch this fall.

stories.title_zh: Anthropic的最新广告正在吸引人们
stories.title_en: Anthropic’s newest ad is creeping people out
stories.desc_zh: Anthropic一直试图将自己描述为其他人工智能公司的道德障碍。这一最新的营销噱头--倾向于批评人工智能，以使人类似乎意识到它所承担的责任--似乎更多地是相同的。
stories.desc_en: Anthropic has consistently attempted to depict itself as the ethical foil to other AI companies. This latest marketing stunt — which leans into criticism of AI as a way to make Anthropic seem aware of the responsibility it carries — would appear to be more of the same.

stories.title_zh: Hinge的创始人筹集了$ 1800万，建立了一个新的人工智能约会服务， Overtone
stories.title_en: The founder of Hinge raised $18M to build a new AI dating service, Overtone
stories.desc_zh: Overtone将自己描述为“由人工智能支持的语音和音频转发服务，提供高度精心策划的介绍。”
stories.desc_en: Overtone describes itself as "a voice- and audio-forward service, enabled by AI, that provides highly curated introductions."

stories.title_zh: 谷歌面临另一起来自主要出版商的人工智能培训诉讼
stories.title_en: Google faces another AI training lawsuit from major publishers
stories.desc_zh: Hachette、Cengage、Elsevier和其他出版商声称，谷歌在没有必要权限的情况下对受版权保护的作品进行了人工智能培训。
stories.desc_en: Hachette, Cengage, Elsevier, and other publishers allege that Google trained its AI on copyrighted works without the necessary permissions.

stories.title_zh: DeepMind首席执行官呼吁建立一个独立的标准机构来监管前沿人工智能
stories.title_en: DeepMind CEO calls for an independent standards body to regulate frontier AI
stories.desc_zh: DeepMind首席执行官Demis Hassabis提出了一个以FINRA为模型的人工智能“标准机构” ，以测试前沿模型并为其发布开发最佳实践。
stories.desc_en: DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis is proposing an AI "standards body" modeled after FINRA, to test frontier models and develop best practices for their release.

stories.title_zh: Meta的Adam Mosseri表示，每个工程师的人工智能代币预算很快就会受到限制
stories.title_en: Meta’s Adam Mosseri says AI token budgets could soon be capped per engineer
stories.desc_zh: Instagram负责人亚当·莫塞里（ Adam Mosseri ）认为，公司最终将需要以管理工资或其他运营费用的方式管理人工智能代币支出，并预测工程师很快将面临使用人工智能工具的支出限制。
stories.desc_en: Instagram head Adam Mosseri believes companies will eventually need to manage AI token spending the same way they manage payroll or other operating expenses, predicting that engineers could soon face limits on how much they spend using AI tools.

stories.title_zh: Google图片进行了类似Pinterest的重新设计，专注于发现
stories.title_en: Google Images gets a Pinterest-like redesign focused on discovery
stories.desc_zh: 现在，当用户导航到Google图片时，他们将看到一个“适合您”的图片库，该图片库根据他们的兴趣和浏览历史记录量身定制。
stories.desc_en: Now, when users navigate to Google Images, they'll see a "For You" gallery of images tailored to their interests and browsing history.

stories.title_zh: 一场高转化抽奖活动应该怎么设计？从奖品、规则到传播路径的完整拆解

stories.desc_zh: 在微信私域生态中，抽奖几乎是商家长期使用的互动玩法：公众号涨粉、社群促活、线下门店引流、会员权益发放、品牌活动传播，都能看到它的身影。它的优势很直接：用户理解门槛低、参与反馈快、成本相对可控，也容易和微信内的公众号、社群、小程序、门店场景结合。 但也正因为抽奖看起来简单，很多活动最后只做成了“一次热闹”。参与人数有了，目标用户没沉淀；奖品发出去了，后续转化没接住；前端页面很热闹，后端领奖、核销、数据复盘却跟不上。 所以，一场高转化抽奖活动的关键，不在于能不能完成基础开奖，而在于奖品设置、参与条件、玩法形式、传播路径、中奖规则、领奖履约能否形成完整闭环。 对企业商家来说，抽奖不是目的。真正重要的是：用户为什么愿意参与，参与后能不能被有效承接，活动结束后数据和用户关系能不能继续沉淀。 下面，我们就结合「活动抽奖」小程序工具的实际能力，从目标设定、奖品组合、参与条件、玩法设计、传播路径到领奖履约

In mid-June, lululemon held a large outdoor yoga activity in the North Bund of Shanghai and suffered heavy rainfall. lululemon did not cancel the activity, but let thousands of people complete the full set of movements on the slippery yoga mat.
